task_name: Add Phase Scanner Parallel Track Review Fixtures
goal: Add Phase Scanner fixtures for parallel-track overlap and dependency review cases without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-034 adds parallel-track overlap and dependency review fixtures.
BP-034 proves the MVP degrades parallel track concerns to require_human_review.
BP-034 does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior or external integration behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already requires human review for overlapping or dependent parallel tracks.
Golden fixtures plus output invariants are enough for this block.
No review-suite wiring change is required because the fixture test already runs from the shared suite.
dod: Overlap-track review fixture exists and is tested.
Dependent-track review fixture exists and is tested.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-033 added hard reject fixtures for missing evidence and unsafe file scope.
